texto: What I try to impart to a musician is to really try to practice the instrument in a really sincere way. Learn as much about music as you possibly can. Learn composition. Study to try to create compositions of your own and put your own personal touch on your music.
explicacao: Citação de Roscoe Mitchell sobre temas ligados a educacao. “What I try to impart to a musician is to really try to practice the instrument in a really sincer…” articula educacao, practice, study em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e study.
